# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: my-vpc-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      routingConfig:
        routingMode: REGIONAL

  - name: my-firewall-rule
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: 
            - "80"
            - "443"
      sourceRanges:
        - "0.0.0.0/0"
      targetTags:
        - web-server
      direction: INGRESS
      priority: 1000

  - name: my-secure-instance-template
    type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    properties:
      properties:
        machineType: zones/$(ref.zone)/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
        disks:
          - boot: true
            autoDelete: true
            initializeParams:
              sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
        networkInterfaces:
          - network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
            accessConfigs:
              - name: External NAT
                type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
        metadata:
          items:
            - key: enable-oslogin
              value: "TRUE"

  - name: my-instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
    properties:
      baseInstanceName: my-instance
      instanceTemplate: $(ref.my-secure-instance-template.selfLink)
      targetSize: 3
      zone: $(ref.zone)

  - name: my-health-check
    type: compute.v1.healthCheck
    properties:
      type: TCP
      tcpHealthCheck:
        port: 80
      checkIntervalSec: 30
      timeoutSec: 10
      healthyThreshold: 2
      unhealthyThreshold: 2

  - name: my-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref.my-health-check.selfLink)
      backends:
        - group: $(ref.my-instance-group.instanceGroup)
      portName: http
      protocol: TCP

  - name: my-url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref.my-backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: my-target-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      urlMap: $(ref.my-url-map.selfLink)

  - name: my-global-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
    properties:
      target: $(ref.my-target-http-proxy.selfLink)
      portRange: "80"
      IPAddress: $(ref.ipAddress.selfLink)

outputs:
  - name: vpcNetworkSelfLink
    value: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
  - name: instanceGroupSelfLink
    value: $(ref.my-instance-group.selfLink)
